what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in the design-assets channel, mapping an attachment id to a target image URI and noting its type and creation timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with microsecond precision
No code symbols or executable content
standouts: Target URI points to an icon named Floorplan_Gold via the image:// scheme
Attachment is typed as images in the design-assets channel
File is a bare metadata record named att-<uuid>.md
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Target uses a custom image:// URI scheme
Includes an added timestamp for provenance
concerns: Target image existence and accessibility cannot be verified from this file alone
No title, alt text, or description for the image
High-precision timestamp may be more granular than needed
notes: A minimal ledger entry that catalogs an image attachment (Floorplan_Gold icon) in the design-assets channel.
questions: What is the Floorplan_Gold icon used for?
Who added this attachment and why?
Does the target image://design-assets/icons/Floorplan_Gold resource actually exist?
Are there other formats or sizes of this icon?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose statement is present, but the file's content and naming convention match the expected behavior of an attachment ledger entry.
intention_signals: To catalog a specific image asset so it can be looked up by attachment id within the design-assets channel.
novelty: The target uses an image:// URI scheme rather than a filesystem path or web URL; otherwise the record is a conventional metadata entry.
contribution: Provides a stable id-to-image-URI mapping and a timestamp for an icon asset in the design-assets channel, supporting lookup and provenance tracking.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment ledger entry att-7907bf31 records an images-type attachment in the design-assets channel pointing to image://design-assets/icons/Floorplan_Gold with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and make discoverable a design-assets channel image attachment for the Floorplan_Gold icon.
